data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. Core Rust acceptance coverage is present and make sanity passes on commit 43fee5599c13. 2. The knot description also requires foolery knots-backend coverage for the native acceptance field read path and backward-compat note fallback. 3. This repository does not contain foolery backend sources or knots-backend-coverage.test.ts, so that required behavior cannot be reviewed or approved from the code under review.
